{{Quote|Ok, I need a pilot to run some patrols for me. That's gonna be you.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:PfT" />}}
The '''dogfight over Naboo''' was a minor [[Realspace/Legends|space]] battle that took place over [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] some time after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Background==
{{Quote|Very good. We've had to cut short some of our patrols because we're running out of pilots. Can you do some patrolling for me?|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:PfT" />}}
While the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] were pestered by criminal gangs such as the [[Maulers]]<ref name="SWG:TPW" /> and the [[Skaak Tippers]] [[Planet/Legends|planetside]],<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /> the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Planetary Defense]] was troubled by the presence of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="SWG:PfT" /> The RSF agents involved in the successful [[Raid on the Skaak Tipper Hideout|operation]] resulting in the death of one of the Skaak Tippers' leaders, [[Jonni Skaak]], having been placed under the command of [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]] in [[Keren/Legends|Keren]],<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /> Typho eyed an opportunity to do something about the pirate problem.<ref name="SWG:PfT" />

==Battle over Naboo==
{{Quote|Good work on that patrol mission, by the way. Rezunin Starwing, one of the Naboo Pirate bosses is in the area. Take him down.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SWI" />}}
Typho decided to lend Naboo Planetary Defense a hand, and ordered his new subordinates to take off into space and patrol the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]]. Half way through their patrol duty, the agents discovered a small [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] force consisting of five [[Kihraxz assault fighter|Kihraxz light fighters]], with who they engaged in combat immediately. The pirates were defeated, and the RSF agents landed in Keren and reported in to Typho.<ref name="SWG:PfT" />

Typho ordered them to go back into space in anticipation of the arrival of the pirate leader [[Rezunin Starwing]]. Starwing arrived with an escort of three [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]], but was defeated by the NPD agents.<ref name="SWG:SWI" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Well, you've helped us clear our piloting backlog, so we'll have to find something else for you to do.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SWI" />}}
Having solved the pirate problem,<ref name="SWG:SWI" /> Typho could concentrate fully on the threat from the Maulers and would dispatch his agents on several missions against the Maulers,<ref name="SWG:TPW" /><ref name="SWG:TMPW" /><ref name="SWG:TSI" /> before placing them under the command of [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]].<ref name="SWG:RtPN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Report to Pooja Naberrie|Naboo}}</ref>
